street.description: Street or way designated a thruway under M.G.L. c. 89 s. 9

from_point.description: Segment start point: a cross street or municipal boundary line, article-stripped (e.g. 'Newton-Boston line', 'Winchester Street'); kept in source order, never reordered

to_point.description: Segment end point: a cross street or municipal boundary line, article-stripped (e.g. 'Newton-Wellesley line'); kept in source order, never reordered

excluded_intersection.description: Cross street whose intersection is carved out of the designation ('... not including the intersection, then, beginning again at the ... limits of such intersection ...'); empty when the segment is continuous

remark.description: Trailing source sentence(s) qualifying the designation (e.g. the state-highway jurisdiction note), verbatim and whitespace-collapsed; source content only, never extractor commentary

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
